title: Tensura: Extras
description: Tensura: Extras brings several new races to tensura: Reincarnated, transforming Vanilla mods
body:
# Tensura: Extras Addon | Under Construction
## Races: 
**(Majin) Arachnid:**

Arachnid > Silkweaver > Shadowspinner > Arachne Sovereign > Arachne Primordial

**(Majin) Turtlet:**

Turtlet > Terraguardian > Titanback Collosus > Leviathan Terrapin > Worldshell


**(Majin) Umbrakin:**

Umbrakin > Astrokin > Nebulith > Cosmavore > Ecliptaris

 

## Racial Skills:

**Arachnid**: Sticky Steel Thread, Spider Sense

**Silkweaver**: Magic Resistance

**Shadowspinner**: Shadowmeld

**Arachne Primordial**: Divine Ki

 

**Turtlet**: Magic Resistance, Physical Attack Resistance

**Terraguardian**: Deflective Shell

**Titanback Collosus**: Earthquake

**Worldshell**: Divine Ki, Ultraspeed Regeneration

 

**Umbrakin**: Spatial Attack Resistance, Vector Shift

**Astrokin**: Spatial Jamming

**Nebulith**: Gravity Manipulation, Spatial Manipulation

**Ecliptaris **: Divine Ki, Singularity Pull (Coming in 1.0.5)

Races must be put into the 'tensura-reincarnated' config

tensuraextras:arachnid | tensuraextras:turtlet | tensuraextras:umbrakin
 
Credits: AniBlake
